title: geranium × lateripes
intro: Geranium × lateripes, also known as the dwarf geranium, is a hybrid of the Pelargonium species, typically grown for its compact size and vibrant flowers. The roots and leaves of the Geranium × lateripes plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Geranium × lateripes include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
